deepseek_direct_judgment.training: none — rank by the LLM's holistic persuasive-force score

findings.loocv_stuck_despite_higher_ceiling: the richer features raise the CEILING but leave-one-out does not improve -> 138 examples is too few to LEARN the mapping; the signal exists, we lack DATA to fit it (exactly why more datasets are the next step)
findings.honest_bound: even overfitting to ALL data with rich features tops out ~0.83 -> ~17% of persuasion is genuinely irreducible; 90-95% is not achievable for 'will THIS message flip THIS person', but ~0.80 is reachable with more data + the LLM
